title: Malicious LiteLLM versions linked to TeamPCP supply chain attack

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Malicious LiteLLM versions linked to TeamPCP supply chain at
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/25
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*checkmarx.zone*'
            - '*sysmon.service*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
